title: Wrap Text in Column Headers
excerpt: This has been posted before but seemed to not get any traction with the developers due to other workload.  Would be really useful and greatly improve the UX.  Hope it makes the list soon.

posts.author: sclankfer (Stephen Lankfer)
posts.cookedHtml: This has been posted before but seemed to not get any traction with the developers due to other workload. Would be really useful and greatly improve the UX. Hope it makes the list soon.

posts.author: StefLancaster (Stefan Lancaster)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yep, have seen a number of threads, one with over 12,000 views, that have just been closed.

@MONDAY - Even if you cant re-size the column header cell based on text length - can you allow us to adjust the header height as we can already do for items - Single, Double, Triple - as this will allow us to wrap some text at least!

I have been moved from Excel to MONDAY and now like MONDAY… EXCEPT this issue which is a massive nightmare (to thousands of other users too based on views of posts)

Please, please, pretty please with sugar on top!
